textByHashes.1faef2a33512022dd9521b61201f0b8f621f47f8: Good day to you, hearty warrior! May the spirits guide you.
textByHashes.11c06aad8e2a6b978942e3393cf615f9d09dbb49: Welcome back, friend of the spirits. I am humbled in your presence. You are no longer the apprentice, but the master. Seek to inspire all with your daring deeds and legendary feats.
textByHashes.37536d89a83f973a27d229d0eb5df0981c684f3e: I see you have free space and no way to record any information you may recover from the caverns. Please take this book as a record of your researches.
textByHashes.eaf8ca3afe607bec688f8e9464221ceda84274b6: Those who have previously entered the cavern have not all returned. Some of them seemed intent upon research and discovery as much as loot and daring deeds.
textByHashes.744a01700eddcaeec96e779b0e6472daf844cc08: It would be a shame if you were to recover any of their notes and be unable to record them handily. I hope the new book will give you space for such discoveries.
textByHashes.e24f3496a5fd82e2608a9696b1a490d393479ee6: Yes, I can work with this, but remember, you cannot comprehend how to wield a hasta until you have learned to create one by following my teachings.
textByHashes.8d003e7c6bb12f9abd88562e682a70db3d7586e7: Yes, I can work with this.
textByHashes.b36792767c97efff66b4cac39a7b634414714b38: Yes, I can convert a Zamorakian spear into a hasta. The spirits require me to request 300,000 coins from you for this service.
textByHashes.1ddc5f30c60b78fd42b649ed423c473a6eb96d76: Yes, I can convert a Zamorakian hasta into a spear. I do not charge for this service.
textByHashes.511b5216f7a6bcac7ec67410836acd43352bb61b: Certainly, though it is quite simple - they are the barbarians of the past who have died in the passing of the years. There are three categories which learned sages claim may describe all spirits encountered.
textByHashes.200ef87d29d3a14d372430c7e04917141282973b: The majority are at peace, having died with their ambitions sated, even if this ambition was as simple as a glorious death. They can contact those in our world in order to spur us on to glory.
textByHashes.733130ef12e35398f6bfb1f6fb718075034457e7: Of course, they cannot or will not contact all inhabitants of these lands, for not all are worthy.
textByHashes.2ae253b3cc7972f9206ca55fa797600f9737f7fd: A second category of spirit is made up of those who are not yet at peace. However, all that is needed is for their mortal remains to be laid to rest and they will join the peaceful majority.
textByHashes.388d4ead4e4a74c2f2ff6d6be3ea578e8e529c73: Alas, there is a small minority who will never be at rest. These have been slain in moments of insanity by their brothers or by adventurers.
textByHashes.24913e203ef3b7db2fc558a435d5a478e436f865: They are not at rest and will attack those they blame for their tortured state. They are not known, however, for being able to determine this blame with any great accuracy, so should be considered dangerous to all.
textByHashes.65e705afecbf8e804bca44299a2aa60bde881f3f: I have further training for you.
textByHashes.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHashes.b199ba0bf672370eb25362ae9a9ed3efaa02e6cc: Correct, you've completed this part of your training.
textByHashes.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHashes.383bedf86b9e3ebc94744b2d7d9b53d1ebcafa23: Good day! You seem a hearty warrior. Maybe even some barbarian blood in that body of yours?
textByHashes.9f0ecf06e73b462f934a302602e12ca192e8f068: Who can tell? My forefathers weren't averse to travelling, so it is possible. They tended to cause too much trouble in your so-called civilised lands, however, so most returned to their ancestral homes.
textByHashes.23ac8aeef42d62fdd606844611aceadb9c71f77e: In any case, given you seem the type, I think you are ready to learn our more secret tribal feats for yourself.
textByHashes.7e604fabcc73b06ec0cd830532c1d70fd66404d3: To begin with, I can supply knowledge in the ways of firemaking, our special rod fishing tricks, a selection of spear skills and our agricultural techniques.
textByHashes.54b6a9c3270cc84affa615508f214eb6187c91d0: Your perception is creditable. I can eventually teach of more advanced firemaking techniques, and the rod fishing skills are but a preliminary to our special potions and brews.
textByHashes.ad6eb9ddb926716a982b9a97701c460859acf402: These secrets must, however, wait until you have mastered the basics.
textByHashes.5cd18602308a54e485be53d03a54680efe155b1a: Me? I am Otto, known as the Godblessed. I follow the ways of our barbarian ancestors, communing with the spirits of the dead and teaching their ways to worthy disciples.
textByHashes.4daab120d2d33bc01d43d7786949e7f535545bea: Perhaps you could be one of them. You look a likely sort to learn of these ways. As I say, you might even have a bit of barbarian blood hidden away in you.
textByHashes.0790289eee60f8eb7f531171aebad13a89f18273: Your scepticism will be your loss.
textByHashes.c0f2a5c58b8109f19d074f13381d3d3e5dde9136: Well then, we will talk when you learn to be less impetuous.
textByHashes.c0019e368dcf67d0e390cabdec39b3b4951ab176: To learn more of such as tool, you must first focus your studies on those fish that the tool is used to catch.
textByHashes.8524543a73e3f1b5f48f97b1e8c2e3f83152ac96: You must catch fish which are usually harpooned, without a harpoon. You will be using your skill and strength.
textByHashes.99875110a8182c44147765dd68997f13cd13b546: Use your arm as bait. Wriggle your fingers as if they are a tasty snack and hungry tuna and swordfish will throng to be caught by you.
textByHashes.089a33baeaa91a9a70a058f85236c3ff93f11c2a: Oh, my mind slipped for a moment, this method does indeed work with shark - though in this case the action must be more of a frenzied thrashing of the arm than a wriggle.
textByHashes.4c52759940ed705f6996fc0dadc114367eb41f7a: While you civilised folk use small, weak fishing rods, we barbarians are skilled with heavier tackle. We fish in the lake nearby.
textByHashes.cb64d215aeb39bdc4bab5f925514de8d2e64528f: Certainly. Take the rod from under my bed and fish in the lake. When you have caught a few fish, I am sure you will be ready to talk more with me.
textByHashes.28b895d420c7a706f076c1dacda2b0c0578414b1: You will know when you are ready, since inspiration will fill your mind.
textByHashes.dc8e0b137f462e23880912e23e0aa7b1a90d344e: We do not use these fish quite as you might expect. When you return we can speak more of this matter.
textByHashes.194c08709c0bc560a71cdc0f3e4472bc5c1eb7b1: The first point in your progression is that of lighting fires without a tinderbox.
textByHashes.e456d90a1d7b9ca9d25cc9d755fccfde1253244b: For this process you will require a strung bow. You use the bow to quickly rotate pieces of wood against one another. As you rub the wood, it becomes hot, eventually springing into flame.
textByHashes.402d5950a566a4530c6fe4fef0dfe9309b71125d: The spirits will aid you. The power they supply will guide your hands. Go and benefit from their guidance upon oak logs.
textByHashes.4cc470472503c94d6681231f34969a31f796e0a1: Ah, so you wish to get your hands dirty? I can teach you how to plant seeds without the use of a seed dibber.
textByHashes.cab8efeb862b916e389a838670dfd4f3cf990718: The difficulty in this method is providing enough force to deeply root the seed in the ground, yet with enough care so that the the seed itself is not damaged.
textByHashes.9f2c51f59ad95b7fe0a1b70304277c3f116feccb: Practice this. You might fail at first, especially if like many a barbarian, you are not used to holding back. Indeed, it may be wise to avoid using seeds you are not willing to lose.
textByHashes.9464fc8a67c2860596d7a2feaf590cbfc52f8dee: Remember to be calm, and good luck.
textByHashes.304cb41e38d03e0e99c6b50e174c25a09affd89e: I see you need encouragement in learning the ways of fishing without a harpoon.
textByHashes.741d36d4bae0c8585a33be05aba191e3376efdcb: Neither is it the most deadly. Go now and return when you have drawn a fish from the sea, with sheer strength and knowledge of our scaled prey.
textByHashes.502a669d70641df62b4632176311d1b2380518df: Alas, I do not sense that you have been successful in your fishing yet. The look in your eyes is not that of the osprey.
textByHashes.3280a2739dd61197dc09f869574d283c64ed5c56: Legendary birds, which the ignorant call eagles. They prey upon fish. Do as they do to gain inspiration.
textByHashes.92a23d2e7969f65fc6c9268bad48e79af1d91cba: By now you know my response.
textByHashes.fcd058d92180e3b5707bdc73ac1093884c85eea6: I see you have yet to be successful in planting a seed with your fists.
textByHashes.2052a1dbe9bc0fe3adc7425d1b2dc493472f0f5b: I sense you have more understanding of harpoons through your studies.
textByHashes.ebee6675125e95966569d7a35babeb2bcc5e2520: Nothing is sane when one is born knowing only certain death. The spirits approve of you however, so death is on your side.
textByHashes.506343766e8a9f5a206fc357699bcc48ca61ee5d: I mean that when you eventually die and find peace, at least the spirits you encounter will be your friends. Alas for you adventurous sort, the natural ways of passing are close to impossible.
textByHashes.36704c754a3ce770d82dd74c1873fc0c4ab655fe: Your mind is as clear as the waters you have fished. This is good.
textByHashes.db9273bd228ebe462c76a77ab1352efeb73938bd: Patience young one. These are fish which are fat with eggs rather than fat of flesh. It is these eggs that are the thing to make use of.
textByHashes.915624e611789490328a4afab25b7d158f04e2a5: The next stage is quite complex, so listen well. In order to send our ancestors into the spirit world, their mortal remains must be burned with due ceremony.
textByHashes.22c8c0cfdf5ef5971ec183fc50dfc7aa3359263a: This can only be done close to the water on the shore of the lake, just to our north-east. You will recognise the correct places by the ashes to be seen there.
textByHashes.3443b4f21f649f27ad14a50ad6f922655459ac98: You will need to construct a small ship by using an axe upon logs in this area, then add the bones of a long dead barbarian hero.
textByHashes.3ca4d9d3c9e637b9e0e2a5dea9f908e89275cec5: From the caverns beneath this lake. Many of our ancestors travelled to these caverns in order to hunt for glory, but found only death. Their bones must still lie inside, their spirits trapped in torment.
textByHashes.921ff1a190573ae9be8d68331fd4f42645344dc2: Correct. The spirit will ascend to glory while the pyre will send the earthly remains to the depths. You will also obtain a closer link to the spirit world.
textByHashes.95b23764b903c2658eaf8424400850afc60df7e0: During this heightened contact, any bones you bury will have increased importance to the gods. The number of bones that may be buried before the link fades will depend on the wood used.
textByHashes.33ab724eaa6ccfe193181b4b044228327583ab72: I have little knowledge of the caverns - they are blocked from the sight of the spirits with whom I commune. I can only suspect that whatever slew the barbarian heroes is indeed mighty.
textByHashes.61838153bad1189909d54cd00026e672603c42ea: I also suspect that the bones you seek might well be very uncommon, since heroes are not found in vast numbers.
textByHashes.7d46fd35e7c0e87ab683816d8416e48e1d01f957: Dive into the whirlpool in the lake to the east. The spirits will use their abilities to ensure you arrive in the correct location. Be warned, their influence fades, so you must find your own way out.
textByHashes.f61ddd4f0ef436e6a7eaf801683e44ca7759987f: Hail to you, saviour of my ancestors. The spirits herald your presence with a spectral fanfare.
textByHashes.4b4953f643d4f42129bf23e40ff2544e2f9b73f5: On this great day you have my eternal thanks. May you find riches while rescuing my spiritual ancestors in the caverns for many moons to come.
textByHashes.a51a335a88273b98232cc8905cc61bd9272ee079: And with that, your training is done. You have gone from apprentice, to master. Seek to inspire all with your daring deeds and legendary feats.
textByHashes.2b007b9ec50a05619322e810a45f0daa53152758: The next step is to manufacture a spear, suitable for combat. To do so, you must speak with our distant cousins on Karamja, in the village of Tai Bwo Wannai.
textByHashes.ca507d6a12bb5ddd96b0513e08eda3043e07f137: I am afraid this is a vital step. The spirits foresee that your understanding of spears will increase through your journey there. You may not progress in the use of spears until you have completed this mission.
textByHashes.110bf7243bb2a0fd579721c85adcff6a63af031e: Many warriors complain that spears are difficult to find, we barbarians thus forge our own.
textByHashes.d913737e01adeca950936ee4202d680f20bb0287: If you use our special barbarian anvil here, you will find it ideal. Other anvils are not sturdy enough or shaped appropriately for the forging work involved. Make any of our spears and return.
textByHashes.b3fe979734e56cbee3d5269be2cad4dd8f08b8b9: Note well that you will require wood for the spear shafts; the quality of wood must be similar to that of the metal involved.
textByHashes.5dc1bd059937a305ebba8ea9bfeae597d4ba6f3a: The next step is to manufacture a one-handed version of a spear, suitable for combat. Such a spear is known to us as a hasta.
textByHashes.8035cfd831889ab7382baa9365daf4dcfefd8a1e: As you might suspect, our ways require greater understanding than is gained by simply looking at a weapon. It is also the case that the process involves a differently
textByHashes.3f15d6b571647c6ad965a7ad31db3f9f16840b1f: balanced spear. Before you may use such a weapon in anger, you must make an example. Only then will you fully understand the poise and techniques involved.
textByHashes.6f8be7b584dc8783e7554dcc5a0c8d1a2e428665: Indeed. You may use our special anvil for this spear type too. The ways of black and dragon spears are beyond our knowledge, however; these spears may not be created.
textByHashes.d31677b314dc1281ba170b7a92b4cbadfd4f7cd2: You do not exude the presence of one who has poured his soul into manufacturing spears.
textByHashes.175bd95eb682fb5018f3d8b1e6534cda9c5a232c: Indeed they did. There are no secrets from those who live eternally.
textByHashes.04e6dedfe7c9c23659d8e8846a657705542a583f: Take some wood and metal and make a spear upon the nearby anvil, then you may return to me. As an example, you may use bronze bars with normal logs or iron bars with oak logs. If you perform this task I will
textByHashes.76373bf14030b1400e5bf008ce04dc92bdb2c614: be freed from the spirits complaining of your lack of dedication.
textByHashes.0eb35075bc70d3e1bdcc2cdaf3b9b78167f0699b: The manufacture of spears is now yours as a speciality. Use your skill well. In addition I am ready to reveal one-handed spear crafts.
textByHashes.8d7f0d48db8da32de0d3a8be08bcaa0b38959cb3: I see you have constructed your hasta, and are approaching readiness.
textByHashes.3add13ae94488023e4740685d23c1cb31acea198: To live life to it's fullest of course - that you may be a peaceful spirit when your time ends.
textByHashes.37c32f35a80dd453ba215022a7591c3489ce15f1: The secret is linked to the fish in the lake nearby. If you use your knife upon them, several new fishy items will be produced. Fish parts can be used as bait, but the roe and caviar is more useful for us.
textByHashes.f4cf558838bac7d889aa6f0876d521c45209ec02: Certainly not. Mixing these items with two dose potions is what should be done. This results in a nutritious slop, perfect for healing as well as imparting the effect of the potion.
textByHashes.4c5c40fda158f12bb96a23cc8f1d3652c332714b: Roe can only be used for some of the more easily combined mixes, while caviar may be used for any of the mixes of which I am aware.
textByHashes.b62983326b07f5f3e94b667befd1cebc12f8363d: You are able to decant a four dose potion into an empty vial, thus giving two potions of two doses. This will aid you in the process.
textByHashes.1f5d358df03ff87275c135b8d2f88e01f735d71f: Have I become so predictable? But yes, I do indeed require a potion. It is of the highest importance that you bring me a lesser attack potion combined with fish roe.
textByHashes.fd415512c4160261de4275ddfeae80fc95a7b065: Bring me a lesser attack potion combined with fish roe. There is more importance in this than you will ever know.
textByHashes.42d79852b69e3162c08839ca61551fabe6438abb: I will take that off your hands now. I will say no more than that I am eternally grateful.
textByHashes.b0732976182265cb026e759ca86988f627ea0ac3: I will not reveal all of my private matters to you. Some secrets are best kept rather than revealed.
textByHashes.1b1cc454c1a9c770b53c31e3376f3dd6170545e0: Yes, I sensed you had found success. Well done.
textByHashes.0c1ae5425bab26084bf18349ffb40816d0fa54c9: Patience comes alongside a strong spirit.
textByHashes.e8eef6e210940fd8888eb5186a125500e7077ae1: No child, but we all have potential to improve our strength.
textByHashes.4cc145205f5a4e987ec9e4057987612575932b62: This technique fully embraces your strength as a barbarian. Nuance is not required here. It's about the fine art of smashing pots.
textByHashes.5509051baa484b0327553a6dcacbc3d5b59785b9: The secret is how to smash them in a way that doesn't leave debris on the ground, for that would not be of benefit to the environment.
textByHashes.2196967b9bb6f47a3c772f7e3fb9f3e43b81e685: Planting a tree is strenuous work. You need to channel this energy into pure anger. Release all that anger on the pot that contained it, shattering it into dust!
textByHashes.4e41105e463d27af3681771b48848d41427b2b1d: May the spirits guide you into success.
textByHashes.4e09e4f532be49d1f7c493c9bbb082ac1c916f45: You have not yet attempted to plant a tree. Why not?
textByHashes.2d343f97964c707c9b24321a15c53ec2e058e7a8: You know your task. Come back when you have completed it.
textByHashes.c66685f8e4cf510085f1c66ef484cac9a1de556a: I can see in your spirit that you have been successful in your latest endeavour.
textByHashes.480379c7905376e9960d3754811c05ff857ddb71: It will become more natural with practice.
